title: Amtech M2015 10 Piece Coping Saw Blade Set
features: DURABLE: These coping saw blades are made from heat treated, hardened carbon steel, with milled and set 24 TPI (teeth per inch) for fine wood cutting
VERSATILE: Suitable for use with 165mm (6.5") coping saw frames, they are compatible with Amtech's M2000 and M2010 coping saws
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage, and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don't forget to also take advantage of amtech’s free product advice service – See pack for more details. Please note that amtech’s Warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
